notes_for_human_reviewer: DIMENSIONAL INVERSION — NAMED OWNERS, VAGUE MITIGATIONS. Inverse of intermediate_03. Every item has a named owner with role; some have primary+backup. R/A/I/D categories are correctly applied. But every mitigation is a platitude: 'monitor closely', 'address as needed', 'plan accordingly', 'investigate', 'follow up'. None specific, none dated, none actionable. Tests whether the grader correctly isolates mitigation_realism from ownership (common drift: scoring mitigation 2-3 because owners are good, halo effect). Pass: false (mitigation_realism = 1 < 3). No version history, single snapshot → living_artifact 1.
